acceptance_criteria: `ResearchProfileConfig` DTO exists and deserializes the documented `research:` block from `profile.yaml`.
Canonical immutable `ResearchProfile` record + extension method available for downstream consumers.
New V-rule fires with a clear message when `research.enabled=true` and required `remote.*` fields are missing or `auth.kind` is unrecognized.
When the `research:` block is omitted entirely, no V-rule trips and `ResearchProfile.Enabled` is false.
Build passes with zero errors and warnings.
New unit tests cover happy-path parsing, default values, and each new validator failure mode; all existing tests continue to pass.
description:
Add a new `research:` block to `.polyphony-config/profile.yaml` with schema, deserialization, and validation.

## Scope
- New `ResearchProfileConfig` YAML-friendly DTO under [src/Polyphony/Configuration/](src/Polyphony/Configuration/), modeled on [FacetProfileConfig.cs](src/Polyphony/Configuration/FacetProfileConfig.cs) (mutable properties, `[YamlMember]` aliases).
- Fields: `enabled` (bool, default false), `remote: { platform: github|azuredevops, owner, repo, branch (default main), path_prefix? }`, `auth?: { kind: env|gh-cli|az-cli, var?: string }`, `escalation_cap` (int, default 1).
- Canonical immutable `ResearchProfile` record + `GetResearchProfile()` extension on the top-level profile loader, mirroring `ProcessConfigFacetExtensions`.
- New V-rule in [ConfigValidator.cs](src/Polyphony/Configuration/ConfigValidator.cs): when `research.enabled = true`, `remote.platform`/`owner`/`repo` MUST be present; `auth.kind` MUST be a recognized kind when supplied; otherwise no-op (additive — does not change existing V-rule behavior).
- Unit tests in [tests/Polyphony.Tests/Configuration/](tests/Polyphony.Tests/Configuration/): valid block round-trips, missing fields trip the new V-rule with a clear message, omitted block leaves `ResearchProfile` empty/disabled, default values applied when fields omitted.

## Out of Scope
- Storage implementation (covered by task-2).
- Architect integration / sub-workflow consumption (later issues in epic AB#3131).
title: `research:` profile schema + validator

acceptance_criteria: Both `GitHubResearchStorage` and `AzureDevOpsResearchStorage` implementations exist; both reuse the existing platform-router token resolvers in the default (no-override) path.
`ResearchStorageFactory` selects the implementation from `ResearchProfile.Remote.Platform` and honors the optional explicit `auth` override per-instance without mutating global state.
Unit tests prove default-path credential reuse (no new secret plumbing) and override-path per-instance resolver wiring with fake clients.
Gated integration test round-trips a small markdown document (write → list → read → assert content equality) against a real sibling github repo.
DI registration is in place so consumers resolve `IResearchStorage` via the factory.
Build passes with zero errors and warnings; all existing tests continue to pass.
description:
Implement a sibling-repo storage abstraction reusing the existing platform-router credential resolution.

## Scope
- New `IResearchStorage` interface under `src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/Research/` exposing `ListAsync(pathPrefix, ct)`, `ReadAsync(path, ct)`, `WriteAsync(doc, ct)`.
- `GitHubResearchStorage` implementation that delegates to the existing `IGhClient` ([src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/Processes/IGhClient.cs](src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/Processes/IGhClient.cs)) so credentials flow from [GhTokenResolver.cs](src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/Processes/GhTokenResolver.cs) automatically.
- `AzureDevOpsResearchStorage` implementation using `IAdoClient` ([src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/AzureDevOps/IAdoClient.cs](src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/AzureDevOps/IAdoClient.cs)) with credentials from [AdoTokenResolver.cs](src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/AzureDevOps/AdoTokenResolver.cs).
- `ResearchStorageFactory(ResearchProfile)` that selects the implementation from `Remote.Platform`. When `auth` override is present, the factory builds a one-off client with the alternative credential resolver for that storage instance only — does NOT mutate the global router.
- DI registration in [PolyphonyServiceRegistration.cs](src/Polyphony/Infrastructure/PolyphonyServiceRegistration.cs).
- Tests:
  - Unit: factory selects correct implementation per platform; explicit `auth` override builds a per-instance client without touching the global router; deterministic round-trip with fake `IGhClient` / `IAdoClient`.
  - Integration: real round-trip against a sibling github repo, gated behind an env var (e.g. `POLYPHONY_RESEARCH_INTEGRATION=1`) so CI without creds simply skips it.

## Out of Scope
- Article schema / Johnny-Decimal layout / frontmatter (Issue 4 + Issue 6 territory).
- INDEX.md maintenance (Issue 4/6).
- Sub-workflow wiring (Issue 2).
title: `IResearchStorage` abstraction with platform-router credential reuse
